title: Incorrect width of members of nested structures

features.name: nested packed struct member width mismatch
features.description: Code should include a nested packed struct definition where accessing a member of the inner struct (e.g., my_struct.test.a) incorrectly returns the width of the entire nested struct instead of the individual member's width

features.name: flat packed struct member correct width
features.description: Code should include a flat (non-nested) packed struct definition where accessing individual members correctly returns the member's declared width
